So the maximum col computed is when blockIdx.x = grid_size.x - 1, tid = 255, i=3: col = (grid_size.x-1)*1024 + 255 + 3*256 = (grid_size.x-1)*1024 + 255 + 768 = (grid_size.x-1)*1024 + 1023. Since grid_size.x = ceil(M/1024), the maximum col is ceil(M/1024)*1024 - 1. That is at most M + (1024 - (M % 1024)) - 1 = M + (1024 - r) - 1 if r!=0, else M+1023?
